conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to I, as our conversation delved deeply into building trust and setting up daily check-ins, which made me feel genuinely aligned with their strategic mindset. G was another strong connection, since we bonded over forming alliances and sharing personal stories about why we're here, creating a sense of teamwork. J also stood out, with our quick agreement on a fair game plan like limiting takes, which built a solid rapport. On the other hand, I felt least connected to H, as our discussion stayed more surface-level, focusing on general strategies without much depth or personal investment.

Yes, I made agreements with I about a verbal pact and daily check-ins, with J on limiting takes to 10-15% and taking turns alphabetically, and with C on introducing ourselves and sharing family traditions to build group trust. Going into the game, I trust I and J the most due to these concrete plans and our shared commitment, but I specifically do not trust others like H as much, since our connection felt weaker and less reliable.
